commit.message:
revert: remove slide transitions, restore direct setAppState pattern

The navigate() wrapper div had no sizing (no h-dvh/flex/overflow),
breaking the flex height chain that screens depend on. This caused
CaptureScreen to render off-screen after PasswordGate and visually
blocked the receipt splitting UI.

Removes: navigate() helper, transitionClass/Key state, wrapper div,
slide keyframes, transition utility classes, and #root height override.

Keeps: safe area insets (07-01), touch targets (07-02), summary scroll
fix (min-h-0), and names preserved on Start Over.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add harden-sshd.sh, enable-stealth-firewall.sh, first-run.sh

harden-sshd.sh:
  - Writes /etc/ssh/sshd_config.d/099-hardening.conf with hardened settings
  - Validates config with sshd -t before applying
  - Reloads sshd if SSH is active; warns and writes anyway if not
  - --dry-run flag shows changes without applying
  - Explains each step with clear output

enable-stealth-firewall.sh:
  - Enables Application Firewall and stealth mode
  - --with-pf configures pf anchor (allow SSH port 22, block all other inbound)
  - Auto-detects active network interface for pf rules
  - Deploys LaunchDaemon for pf persistence if plist is available in repo
  - --dry-run flag shows changes without applying
  - Explains why block-all is not used (breaks SSH)

first-run.sh:
  - Interactive bootstrap for a new or freshly wiped Mac
  - Installs Homebrew, taps mac-deploy, runs audit, applies hardening
  - --auto flag for unattended runs; --audit-only to skip hardening
  - Explains every step before executing; prompts for confirmation
  - Re-audits at the end to confirm baseline is met

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Major prompt rewrite: dynamic prompts, Indian fashion, Gemini-optimized

Based on expert review from 2 fashion photographers + 2 AI prompt engineers:

DETECT PROMPT (2.5 Pro):
- Rigid template for consistent prompt structure (ACTION/SCENE/POSE/PRODUCT/PRESERVE)
- Full Indian fashion coverage: saree (pallu/pleats/blouse/border), lehenga (3-piece),
  kurta, sherwani, anarkali, salwar kameez, dhoti, juttis, kolhapuris
- Indian ethnic jewelry: jhumkas, chandbalis, maang tikka, nath, mangalsutra,
  rani haar, kundan sets, bangles/choodas, kamarbandh, haath phool, payal
- New zones: "waist" (belts/kamarbandhs), "drape" (standalone dupattas/stoles/shawls)
- Fixed poses: relaxed fingers (not spread), side-body backpack (not rear angle),
  waist-height footwear camera (not low angle), layering guidance (jacket over shirt)
- Relative sizing ("focal point", "prominently visible") instead of percentages
- Lighting/color match section for realistic compositing
- Phone-in-hand handling, glasses-on-glasses scenario
- 7 worked examples including saree, bridal jewelry set, sherwani

FALLBACK PROMPTS (for image gen models):
- Rewritten from ~2000 tokens aggressive to ~300 tokens neutral
- Identity-first structure (face/skin/hair before everything else)
- Removed all aggressive language (wastes tokens, may trigger safety filters)
- "photorealistic" keyword added (most impactful quality keyword for Gemini)

IMAGE GENERATION (generateTryOn):
- Hybrid merge: dynamic prompt + CORE_RULES always appended (never lose safety rails)
- Prompt-first content ordering (text before images for better Gemini comprehension)
- temperature: 0.35 (reduces identity drift)
- personGeneration: 'allow_adult' (prevents safety filter interference)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: fullscreen map using inline styles to escape stacking context

Tailwind's z-50 doesn't work when parent layout creates a CSS stacking
context. Use inline position:fixed + zIndex:99999 instead.

commit.message:
Fix inference dtype mismatch: cast query to match KV cache dtype

SDPA requires q/k/v to share dtype. During training autocast handles
this, but at inference the model can output float32 queries while the
KV cache stores bf16. Cast query to match key dtype before attention.

commit.message:
Fix ninja scraper: extract prices from Next.js RSC pages

The ananinja.com site uses Next.js RSC — JSON-LD is embedded inside
self.__next_f.push() calls, not standard <script type="application/ld+json">.
Old parser found 0 prices. New approach uses 3 strategies:
1. Regex extract "price":XX from RSC chunks
2. priceCents/originalPriceCents from embedded product JSON
3. CSS fallback on visible HTML

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Match map seed range to Civ4 BTS (% 73637381)

Civ4 BTS constrains map seeds to [0, 73637380] via modulo in CvGame.cpp.
Our seeds were ~1.7 trillion from Date.now(). Apply the same modulo for
authenticity and cross-compatibility with original seed values.

Add pg_trgm GIN index for fast fuzzy dedup

  cards.question for O(log n) trigram similarity queries

commit.message:
fix: Redeploy Precursors with corrected Vite base path

Assets were served at root-relative paths (/assets/...) but the game
lives at /play/creatures/ — causing 404s and a perpetual loading screen.
Fixed by adding `base: '/play/creatures/'` to vite.config.ts and rebuilding.

Also corrects PWA manifest scope/start_url to match deployment path.

commit.message:
feat(macros): add verified DirtyFlags dependency tracking (ADR-010 stage 2)

Walk component function bodies with syn::visit to detect state.field
accesses, map them to DirtyFlags via FIELD_FLAG_MAP, and emit compile
errors when deps() doesn't cover observed reads. Adds allow(field, ...)
escape hatch for intentional gaps and scans macro token streams for
field accesses inside format!/println! etc.

commit.message:
Fix player profile pages for Cloudflare Workers (#49)

Changed player profile pages from server-side rendering with fs.readFileSync
to static prerendering with getStaticPaths(). Cloudflare Workers don't support
Node.js filesystem APIs, so pages must be prerendered at build time.

- Use import.meta.glob to load player JSON files
- Generate static paths from player index files
- All 20 player profiles now prerender successfully

commit.message:
fix(changeset): use privatePackages instead of ignore list

All internal packages (@rafters/*, apps) already have private:true.
Setting privatePackages:false makes changesets invisible to them —
no validation errors, no dependency chain complaints. Only the
rafters CLI (which lacks private:true) gets versioned and published.

commit.message:
Fix lesson runtime crash: clear stale activity content on slot advance

handleSelectActivity set selectedActivity synchronously but left
activityContent carrying the previous activity's content shape across
the async boundary. ActivityShell rendered with mismatched props,
crashing when the new component accessed fields from the old content.

Fix: clear activityContent to null before await, guard against stale
resolution with activeActivityKeyRef, and use activityContent presence
as the canonical loading signal.

commit.message:
Fix Hiddify APK download and add repo-hosted APK fallback

- Bug: grep -oP pattern 'android-universal' was case-sensitive,
  didn't match Hiddify's 'Android-universal' filename, resulting in
  empty URL passed to curl ("URL rejected: Malformed input")
- Replaced fragile grep -oP with jq for robust JSON parsing
- APKs now download from freedom repo GitHub Release first,
  falling back to upstream repos if unavailable
- All patterns use case-insensitive matching via jq test()
